name: Aztec Pyramid Avocado Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Use three California avocados with dark skin that have been peeled.
2. Layer 1: Mash the avocados and mix in the lemon juice. Spread evenly in a bowl or serving plate to the edges of the dish.
3. Layer 2: Beat the cream cheese until smooth and creamy. Blend in the sour cream, then add the taco seasoning mix, mixing well. Spread over the avocado layer.
4. Layer 3: Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the cream cheese mixture.
5. Layer 4: Distribute finely chopped tomatoes over the cheddar cheese layer.
6. Layer 5: Spread sliced green onions over the tomato layer.
7. Layer 6: Top with sliced black olives.
8. Serve at room temperature. Makes about 10 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Tortilla chips, bell peppers, lobster, jicama.
